data.title: Norwegian company K33 received 185 million Swedish kronor in funding to increase its Bitcoin reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Norwegian company K33 announced that it has received 185 million Swedish kronor (about 17.2 million US dollars) in funds, which it plans to use to further increase its holdings of Bitcoin to strengthen its corporate treasury configuration. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Texas Sheriff Takes Action Against Crypto ATM Amid Scam Allegations
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, a Texas sheriff has taken decisive action against a local cryptocurrency ATM following reports of a family being scammed out of $25,000. The incident has sparked debate among cryptocurrency users regarding the appropriateness of the sheriff's actions. Local reports from Tuesday indicate that a scammer impersonated a government employee to deceive a family in Jasper County, northwest of Houston, into depositing funds at a Bitcoin ATM. Jasper County Sheriff Chuck Havard obtained a search warrant and proceeded to cut open the ATM, which was operated by Bitcoin Depot, in an effort to recover approximately $32,000, including the $25,000 lost by the family.

Sheriff Havard explained that the scam involved a caller instructing the family to pay $25,000 in fines by depositing the money into a Bitcoin address, leading them to use the Bitcoin ATM for the transaction. Bitcoin Depot has been contacted for comment on the incident. The sheriff's actions have drawn criticism from some crypto users, with Reddit user JohnDLG questioning whether government employees destroyed property and took money from an innocent third party. Another Reddit user, Jad8484, expressed confusion over the sheriff's approach, likening it to confiscating money from a store register after someone purchased gift cards for scammers. Despite the criticism, Havard defended his actions, stating that his department would use all available resources to protect citizens from scammers.

Sheriff Havard acknowledged the complexity of cases involving cryptocurrency scams, noting that they can be challenging to solve. He also mentioned that his department has not yet located the scammer responsible for the incident. This event occurs amid increasing scrutiny of cryptocurrency ATMs both in the United States and internationally. In June, Spokane, Washington, banned crypto ATMs due to a rise in scam activity targeting residents. The FBI reported nearly 11,000 complaints and over $246 million in losses related to crypto ATM scams in 2024, marking a 31% increase from the previous year. Additionally, the Australian Transaction Reports and Analysis Centre recently imposed a limit of 5,000 Australian dollars ($3,250) on cash deposits and withdrawals at crypto ATMs.

data.title: Binance adjusts the minimum price change unit for multiple spot trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum price change unit (TickSize) of 18 spot trading pairs including 1000SATS/FDUSD, DAI/JPY, GNO/USDT at 5:00 (UTC) on June 27, 2025 to improve market liquidity and trading experience. This adjustment will not affect the spot trading function, but API users need to obtain the latest parameters through GET/api/v3/exchangeInfo. Existing orders will continue to be matched according to the original TickSize. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Mexico's third-richest man once again increased his Bitcoin holdings, with BTC-related assets accounting for more than 70% of his portfolio
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Salinas Ricardo Pliego, founder and chairman of Grupo Salinas and the third richest man in Mexico, said he had increased his holdings of Bitcoin again last week. Although he did not disclose specific purchase data, it is said that about 70% of his investment portfolio is Bitcoin, and this proportion will increase after the latest increase. Salinas Ricardo Pliego has previously stated that he is considering converting his entire investment portfolio to Bitcoin. (Bitcoinist)

data.title: Sahara AI: Jointly with OKX, we launched an exclusive airdrop of 28 million tokens, divided into 2 reward pools
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sahara AI officially announced on the X platform that TGE is in progress. In addition, the official will cooperate with OKX to launch an exclusive airdrop event for SAHARA tokens - 28,000,000 tokens are distributed in two reward pools. Click okx.SaharaAI.com to view.
Among them, Reward Pool A: for early Sahara AI platform users, get extra rewards outside of TGE activities; Reward Pool B: for newly registered OKX users, open to everyone, without prior participation in Sahara AI activities.

data.title: Telegram ecosystem trading app Blum has opened airdrop query: 30% of TGE can be claimed on the same day, and the remaining part will be unlocked in equal amounts within 180 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Telegram ecological trading application Blum official posted on the X platform that the BLUM token distribution and badges have been revealed. A series of actions that users have previously completed in Blum, such as BP, MP, recommendation, trading, check-in, tasks, etc., will affect the airdrop distribution. Badges will provide users with additional BLUM tokens in addition to the main allocation quota, and if they rank high in any category, they will also receive additional rewards.
In addition, the official emphasized that users can immediately receive 30% of the airdrop when they receive tokens starting from the TGE day, and the remaining part will be unlocked in equal amounts every day within 180 days. Users can claim freely at any time, but any remaining allocations after claiming will be destroyed, thereby reducing the total supply of BLUM tokens. Wisely said-patience may pay off.

data.title: Ant Digits: No formal cooperation agreement has been reached with Hainan Huatie on RWA and stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ant Digits issued an announcement, "Recently, we have noticed rumors in the market that Ant Digits and Hainan Huatie are discussing cooperation on RWA and stablecoins, which has attracted market attention. Ant Digits hereby clarifies that the two parties have only had very preliminary and exploratory exchanges on RWA, and have not reached any form of formal cooperation agreement, business arrangement or substantive project implementation. In addition, some companies in the market have recently hyped up hot concepts such as RWA and stablecoins, implying false cooperation with Ant Digits. Investors and partners are requested to carefully identify market rumors and pay attention to investment risks. Ant Digits reserves the right to pursue legal responsibility for any unauthorized use of our company's name for improper publicity. Ant Digits is committed to compliance innovation, and any important progress will be disclosed in a timely manner through official channels. Please be informed."
